## Description
[One sentence describing the security issue]

## Severity
- [ ] priority:critical - Immediate action required
- [ ] priority:high - Urgent, should be fixed soon
- [ ] priority:medium - Should be fixed
- [ ] priority:low - Nice to fix

## Type
- [ ] Vulnerability (CVE)
- [ ] Misconfiguration
- [ ] Access Control Issue
- [ ] Data Exposure
- [ ] Dependency Vulnerability
- [ ] Other: [type]

## Vulnerability Details

### Affected Component
[What is affected - e.g., authentication, API endpoint, dependency]

### Attack Vector
[How can an attacker exploit this?]

### Impact
[What can happen if exploited?]

## Steps to Reproduce
1. [Step 1]
2. [Step 2]
3. [Step 3]

## Proof of Concept
```
[Code or steps to demonstrate the vulnerability]
```

## Recommended Fix
[If known, describe the fix]

## References
- OWASP: [link if applicable]
- CVE: [link if applicable]
- Related: [links]

## Disclosure
- [ ] Public issue
- [ ] Private - responsible disclosure
